title: gagea ellyptica
intro: Gagea ellyptica, also known as Gagea, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the lily family, native to Europe and Asia. The medicinal properties of Gagea ellyptica lie in its roots, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, inflammation, and cough. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which may help alleviate congestion and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Gagea ellyptica include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat colds, bronchitis, and other respiratory conditions.
